extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays mostly low (around 0.1–0.3) for a long middle segment and then rises only moderately, never forming a clear, tall “second peak” near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop and low middle, the series shows a pronounced late increase, forming a distinct high “second peak” near the end that reaches close to the height of the initial maximum.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial sharp drop, the series stays low (near its minimum) for a relatively long middle segment, then rises gradually and remains in a medium range without any large spike at the very end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial sharp drop, the series rises to a medium plateau, then later exhibits a pronounced late spike near the end that clearly exceeds the preceding medium-range values.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series remains relatively low and flat in the middle (roughly between indices 20 and 60) and then increases only moderately, without any large spike near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop and a low middle segment (roughly between indices 20 and 60), the series exhibits a pronounced late spike near the end (after about index 80), clearly higher than the preceding values.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series remains low (around 0.1–0.25) for a relatively long middle segment before slowly rising again toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series quickly rises back to a medium level (around 0.4–0.5) and stays around that level during the middle segment, without a prolonged low plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 10–20), the series stays in a low region (roughly below 0.25) for a prolonged middle segment (about time 20–40), without any large late spike.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop (around time 10–20), the series either does not stay long in the very low region (below 0.25) or it exhibits a pronounced late spike or surge (after about time 70) that pushes values clearly above 0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays in a relatively low range (roughly between 0.1 and 0.5) for the rest of the time, without any large spike back up near the original peak at the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series eventually shows a clear late spike, rising again close to or above the early-peak level near the end of the time axis.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays at a relatively low level (around 0.1–0.3) for a long middle segment before rising again toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series quickly rises and remains at a medium level (around 0.4–0.5) for most of the middle segment, without a long low plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series remains relatively low and flat (no large spike) toward the end of the time axis.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series exhibits a pronounced upward spike near the end of the time axis.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial drop (first ~20 time steps), the series stays relatively low and flat without any sharp spike above roughly 0.6 near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial drop (first ~20 time steps), the series shows a clear late spike where it rises sharply above roughly 0.6 near the end of the time axis.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial sharp drop, the series stays in a relatively low band (roughly between 0.1 and 0.5) with no large spike near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial sharp drop and mid‑segment recovery, the series shows a clear, pronounced upward spike near the end, reaching values noticeably higher than the preceding plateau.
